title: UNIGE & UNEP/GRID-Geneva data cubes Capacity Building
text:
This website contains capacity building material related to data cubes developed by UNIGE and UNEP/GRID-Geneva for various projects.
It aims at improving the understanding of data cube concepts and their use in the projects mentioned, through detailed explanations and dedicated exercices.

title: Definitions
text:
Open data cube (ODC)
“free, open-source software package that simplifies the management and analysis of large amounts of satellite imagery and other Earth observation data”
“allows users to easily access, process, and analyze decades of geographical data to track changes on Earth’s surface over time”
https://www.opendatacube.org
